How-To-Repeat: Part Of My Script:
####
WHILE="1"
while [ "$WHILE" -eq 1 ]
do
    /usr/sbin/usbconfig -u 4 -a 2 power_off
    /usr/sbin/usbconfig -d ugen4.1 set_config 255
    /usr/sbin/usbconfig -d ugen4.1 set_config 0
done

####
